Careers / FY26 intake

Small team, real systems, fast feedback.

We're 35 people running production systems for 120+ clients. There's no bench, no graduate cohort to babysit you, and no work that doesn't matter. If that sounds good, keep reading.

Open roles

5 positions open.

Most roles are Perth-based. Hybrid is supported once you're up to speed. The on-call rotation is real but fairly compensated.

ROLE_01 / GRADUATE

Business Analyst — IT Projects

Hiring process

Three steps. No theatre.

We don't run assessment centres. We don't ask brain teasers. We have a conversation about the work, and then we make a decision quickly.

STEP_01

Apply

Submit your CV through the role page. A real human at NexusPoint reads every application — no automated screening.

STEP_02

Conversation

One call with the hiring manager, about 30 minutes. Real questions about the work and how you think.

STEP_03

Decision

We come back to you within a week. Salary, conditions, and start date are on the table at offer stage — no negotiation games.

NexusPoint Systems

Managed IT services and cybersecurity for Western Australian mid-market businesses. 24/7 NOC, cloud expertise, and security-first by design.
